description:
Copy and CTA changes on the Events page.

COPY CHANGES:
1. Replace the existing 'OPEN CALENDAR IN NEW TAB' link/button text with: 'Our community hosts events nearly every day. See upcoming events on our Luma calendar ->' (treat as a single CTA — likely a link or button with arrow affordance pointing to the Luma calendar URL).
2. Replace the 'Host an event' display text/heading with: 'Host an event in our space'

NEW CONTENT — host-an-event CTAs:
Below the 'Host an event in our space' heading, add the following content with TWO buttons:

   To host a free event, add it directly to our:
   [Luma calendar]  <-- BUTTON, links to the Luma calendar URL

   To host a paid event: email:
   [crystal@fractalnyc.com]  <-- BUTTON, mailto:crystal@fractalnyc.com

The labels ('To host a free event...' / 'To host a paid event...') are display copy preceding each button. Each button label is the action target (calendar name / email). Use the existing button component / styling so they match the rest of the site.

SCOPE: locate the events page (likely src/app/events/page.tsx) and the relevant CTA / section components. Update copy and add the two buttons with proper hrefs. Verify mobile layout — buttons should stack cleanly on narrow viewports.

OUT OF SCOPE: redesigning the events page layout, the calendar embed itself, or other sections.

ACCEPTANCE:
- 'OPEN CALENDAR IN NEW TAB' text is replaced with the new sentence + arrow CTA pointing to the Luma calendar.
- 'Host an event' heading reads 'Host an event in our space'.
- Two new buttons exist below that heading: 'Luma calendar' (links to the Luma calendar) and 'crystal@fractalnyc.com' (mailto link).
- Preceding copy ('To host a free event...' / 'To host a paid event: email:') is rendered above each button.
- Mobile layout reads cleanly at 375px (buttons stack, no clipping).
title: Events page: copy edits + restructure host-an-event CTA into two buttons (free vs paid)
